## Tuple.every() function

**Signature:**

```typescript
export function every<T extends Tuple, U extends Item<T>>(tuple: T, refinement: Refinement<Item<T>, U, [index: number]>): tuple is {
        [K in keyof T]: U extends T[K] ? U : never;
    };
```
